primary_source: Whittaker, 1903. On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics. Math. Annalen 57:333-355. DOI: 10.1007/BF01444290.
title: QA Whittaker Rational Direction S^1 PASS [266] - canonical net at m=24
_fixture_purpose: PASS fixture at m=24. |D_24|=359; G_max=2785; Delta_max^+(24) bounded by 0.080 rad. W2 all-pairs validates 64,261 distinct pairs of cross-product integrality. Mod-24 is the standard QA applied modulus per CLAUDE.md (mod 24 'applied'). The 24-cycle Cosmos orbit (72 pairs in S_24 broadly speaking, though here we count coprime pairs in {1..24}^2 = 359).
source_attribution: (Whittaker, 1903) On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics, Math. Annalen 57:333-355, DOI: 10.1007/BF01444290.
